text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
There's no need to worry, Trainer. It's just a little
scrape.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
A little bit of spit and it'll heal right up!
Ptooey!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Truly, I'm fine. You know how resilient I am,
riiight?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Please let me continue! A true princess would
never stop training over something so small as
this!
choice_data_list:
A princess should know when to stop, for her
own sake and everyone else's.

A princess should know when to stop, for her
own sake and everyone else's.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Please let me continue! A true princess would
never stop training over something so small as
this!
choice_data_list:
A princess should know when to stop, for her
own sake and everyone else's.

A princess should know when to stop, for her
own sake and everyone else's.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
For everyone's sake? Now that you mention it,
there was a scene like that in the original Princess
Fighter series.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
The princess tried to keep working even after
coming down with a fever, so everyone in the
castle came to help her at once—it was chaos!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I would never want to trouble the people around
me in that way!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I suppose I have no choice. Oh, I'm such a
worthless princess...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A dejected Kawakami Princess takes some time to
rest and recover from her injury.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! As you can see, I'm already full of
energy. There's no cause for concern!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Ugh! Ouch!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Urghhh! A p-princess needs to...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Take care of her health... Gahh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess seems to have aggravated her
injury. I decide to have her take a break from
training for a while.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: See? I'm in fine form, right?
choice_data_list: I guess you were fine after all!
I guess you were fine after all!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Hehe. ♪ This is the resiliency of a princess!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Such a tiny injury won't keep me from charging
ahead! Let's keep trucking!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I must completely! Wholly! Fully make up for lost
time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess manages to get back to her
training without a hitch.
